# GENERIC_EXACT_REQUEST_ENGINE_INSTALLATION_20260715

Status: PASS_GENERIC_EXACT_REQUEST_ENGINE_V1_INSTALLED_AND_VALIDATED

Generic exact request support is now validated. This replaces number-specific logic.

```text
supported_count_range = 1..50000
micro_batch_size = 100
formula = micro_batch_count = ceil(N / micro_batch_size); batch_i = min(micro_batch_size, remaining)
memory_changed = False
```
